reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent application, selected the specified agent, verified its status as "idle", sent a math question, received the correct response, and verified it contains "4".
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing agents.
Find and click "QA-20260604-231904-2nsz" agent in the sidebar — Agent was located in the sidebar and clicked successfully, opening the agent detail page.
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the header (visible in both sidebar and main content area).
Send message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into the input field and sent via Send button successfully.
Wait up to 3 minutes for a response — Response received immediately (within seconds) from the agent.

Verify the response mentions "4" and take a screenshot — Agent response clearly shows "4" as the answer. Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" on the right and agent response "4" in the center of the chat area.
